welcome.introNew: An adaptive training plan built around your goal — not a template. Each week adjusts based on how you're actually progressing.
welcome.introRevisit: Walk back through your setup. Change anything — your plan rebuilds around it. Nothing saves until the last step.

goal.heading: What's your goal?
goal.sub: This sets everything — how often you train, how hard you push, and which exercises you see.
goal.loadError: Couldn't load goals. Check your connection.

experience.heading: How long have you been training?
experience.sub: Sets the starting intensity and how quickly the plan progresses.

beginner.title: New to lifting
beginner.description: New to lifting, or returning after a break

advanced.title: Seasoned lifter
advanced.description: Several years; progress comes slowly now

days.heading: How many days can you train?
days.sub: {{goal}} works best at {{min}}–{{max}} days per week.

equipment.heading: What equipment do you have?
equipment.sub: Select everything available to you. Bodyweight exercises are always included.
equipment.bodyweightNote: Bodyweight is always available — no need to select it.

extras.heading: A couple more things
extras.limitationsPlaceholder: E.g. left knee pain, avoid overhead pressing

errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save your profile. Give it another try.
errors.offline: You're offline — connect once to finish setup.
